race.comment: VANDOULA JET (12) comes here third-up into the campaign and looks ready to go to the next level now. She comes back from Open 3YO company last start where she held her own when sitting up on the speed. Easier here and with the added fitness, she can get back to winning ways. HURRICANE HARLEY (7) got the job done two back before tackling Open 3YO grade last start when behind VANDOULA JET. That form looks strong for a race like this and he boasts a good record at this track and trip. Can get back to winning ways this time around. MOHEGAN RULER (9) comes here first-up but has trialled very nicely coming into this, beating handy types most recently. Azzopardi was on board for his latest trial and sticks with him today. This is easier than what he contested last campaign and a forward showing is on the cards. SATURDAY SESH (3) can give a bold sight from the front. APPARATUS (10) gets Pike on board and can be in the finish.
